flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pennsylvania College of Health Sciences rose 30% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.0k → $15.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pennsylvania College of Health Sciences rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.9k → $32.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pennsylvania College of Health Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pennsylvania College of Health Sciences rose 82% between 2006 and 2009 (453 → 826).
